## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this script do, or what did you fix? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New script or config
- [ ] Fix to an existing script
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Something else (explain above)

## Checklist

- [ ] The file has an MIT attribution header (`SPDX-FileCopyrightText` + `SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT`). CI enforces this; run `tools/check-license-headers.sh` to confirm.
- [ ] The script has a header comment (purpose, context, parameters, tested-on).
- [ ] No secrets: no API keys, tokens, passwords, or real environment URLs.
- [ ] Shell scripts pass `shellcheck` with no warnings.
- [ ] I tested this on at least one Mac and noted the macOS version in the header.
- [ ] If it does anything destructive, the header says so.

## Where it was tested

<!-- e.g. macOS 15.5 on Apple silicon, run as a Jamf policy script -->
